SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface BlockContract

All Superinterfaces:
AuxiliaryContract, SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
BlockContractImpl
public interface BlockContract extends AuxiliaryContract

A block contract.

When a block contract is encountered in an existing proof, a BlockContract is used. To generate a new proof obligation for a block contract, use FunctionalBlockContract instead.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AuxiliaryContract

    AuxiliaryContract.Terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables, AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

  • Method Details

    • update

      BlockContract update(StatementBlock newBlock, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newPreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newFreePreconditions, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newPostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newFreePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newModifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable,JTerm> newFreeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newInfFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, JTerm newMeasuredBy)
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      newPreconditions - the new preconditions.
      newPostconditions - the new postconditions.
      newModifiableClauses - the new modifiable clauses.
      newFreeModifiableClauses - the new free modifiable clauses.
      newInfFlowSpecs - the new information flow specifications.
      newVariables - the new variables.
      newMeasuredBy - the new measured-by clause.
      Returns:
      a new block contract with the specified attributes.

    • setTarget

      BlockContract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Specified by:
      setTarget in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      newKJT - the type containing the new target method.
      newPM - the new target method.
      Returns:
      a new block contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different target.

    • setBlock

      BlockContract setBlock(StatementBlock newBlock)
      Specified by:
      setBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      newBlock - the new block.
      Returns:
      a new block contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different block.

    • map

      BlockContract map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

    • toLoopContract

      LoopContract toLoopContract()
      Returns:
      the LoopContract from which this contract was generated, or null.
